Our best deals on Google phones and accessories.

  • Phones
  • Accessories
GOOGLE

Pixel 10 On Us.
No trade-in needed. 

Do spectacular, on the regular. Yours when you activate a line on most plans.

Shop now
With 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on a qualifying plan. For well-qualified customers; plus tax & $35 device connection charge.
ONLY AT T-MOBILE

T-Satellite is here.
And now, it’s powering apps.

From remote hikes to coastal waters, you can now use T-Satellite data to power some of your favorite apps including, WhatsApp, AllTrails, and more from Apple and Google.

Learn more
Texting & select satellite-ready apps with compatible device in most outdoor areas in the U.S. where you can see the sky. Satellite service, including text to 911, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable. Included with Experience Beyond plans or $10/mo.; auto renews monthly. Cancel anytime in T-Life App. AllTrails iOS availability anticipated in November 2025.
GOOGLE AI IS AT ITS BEST

Get the new Pixel 10a & Pixel Buds 2a On Us.

No trade-in needed when you add a new line on most plans.

Shop now
Pixel 10a: for well-qualified buyers via 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on most plans; plus tax & $35 device connection charge. Pixel Buds: with purchase of qualifying Google Pixel device on a qualifying plan; plus tax. Existing Go5G members also qualify. Plus, get Pixel 2 a On Us via instant discount in cart.
GET SAVINGS THAT LAST

T-Mobile customers had the lowest wireless bills.

Vs. Verizon and AT&T over the past 5 years.

Switch and save
Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots.

If you cancel entire account before receiving 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement is due; for phones, contact us. Bill credits end if you pay off device early. For well-qualified customers, plus tax & $35 device connection charge.

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Join how and when you want—right here or in the T-Life app.

No trade-in needed to join the best network.

Keep your phone or score a great deal on a new one when you activate a line. Explore deals.

FREE same-day delivery.

For a limited time, get your new phone, 5G Home Internet, or both delivered for FREE the same day you switch. Check availability at checkout.

Best Mobile Network in the US according to Ookla® Speedtest®. 

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Check out in 15 minutes or less per line. Median check-out time using T-Life app; activation may take longer (e.g., with locked phones). Device activation, data & number transfer will take additional time.

Free Same-Day Delivery

Free Same-Day Delivery: Phone delivery for eligible new accounts. Home Internet delivery for new and existing customers activating an eligible new Home Internet line. For both, see if same-day delivery is an option during checkout. Plus tax. Same-day delivery is not available in all areas and may not be available due to order cutoff times. Weather, traffic, driver availability and safety, and other uncontrollable conditions may affect delivery window.

According to Ookla® Speedtest®. Best: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission. Fastest: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data of national Speed Score results incorporating 5G download and upload speeds for 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission.

Shop data plans

Discover more on Android

GOOGLE GEMINI

Create & share jaw-dropping images straight from your phone.

Your creative ideas are now fun and functional. Combine and blend multiple images, resize your creations in a range of sizes, and add clear text—perfect for invitations, infographics, comic panels, and more.

CIRCLE TO SEARCH WITH GOOGLE

Your new interpreter is here. Search it to translate what's on your screen.

See continuous translations as you scroll through pages and apps. Whether you’re reading menus, news articles, or social media posts and comments, get automatic translations in your preferred language, without switching apps.

Available on select devices and internet connection required. Works on compatible apps and surfaces. Results may vary depending on visual matches. Check responses for accuracy.
GOOGLE MESSAGES

Remix any photo, right in your messages.

Bring more fun to the chat when you remix photos in Google Messages. Turn your pet into an action figure, redesign your friend’s room, or try a 1950s makeover – without leaving the chat.

Availability varies. Age 18+. Check responses. Create responsibly. Results for illustrative purposes and may vary.
ANDROID

New Android features helping you stay in flow.

We’re bringing new features to help you share and connect—without breaking your flow. Remix photos in Google Messages, easily spot and leave scam group chats, and let friends know when your call is important.

PHONE BY GOOGLE

Call Reason.

Make your important calls stand out. Call Reason (in beta), coming soon, lets you flag a call to a saved contact as ‘urgent’, so they know it’s time-sensitive and can prioritize answering or getting back to you.

Only available between two Android devices when both have Phone by Google set as their primary calling app.

Rich Communication Services (RCS) just made texting better.

With the release of iOS18, texting between Android and iPhone users has never been better. Your reaction to texts will no longer be spelled out. You’ll get high-resolution image and video sharing without losing picture quality. Group chats have been enhanced with the ability to name them, exit them, and add and remove people from them. There’s also typing indicators as well as read receipts to let you know your message has been received.

MAGENTA STATUS

Magenta Status

FREE TRIAL

Free trial

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
